title: Xerid Crunchy Korean Peanuts Rice Bowl
description: Savory and pillowy Korean rice bowl featuring crunchy peanuts and a tangy yuzu-cure. A crowd-pleaser from the Gyeongsang region.
instructions: Rinse the donabe rice in a fine mesh strainer and drain well.
In a medium saucepan, heat the sesame oil over medium heat.
Add the gochujang and stir to combine, cooking for 1 minute.
Stir in the yuzu juice, soy sauce, and sugar, cooking for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the peanuts to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until the peanuts are lightly toasted.
Transfer the rice to the donabe and add 2 cups of water.
Bring to a boil and then reduce the heat to low and cover the donabe.
Simmer for 15 minutes, until the water has been absorbed and the rice is tender.
Fluff the rice with a fork and stir in the peanut mixture.
Season with crushed black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with additional peanuts and yuzu juice if desired.
